content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward modules in DeepResearch Agents can be wired to draw on episodic memory traces from the neural architecture of planning agents to prioritize open-ended research exploration: the agent will prioritize searching for research directions that connect disconnected past research findings stored in its episodic memory, rather than just optimizing for incremental answers to a given query. This creates a self-organizing research discovery loop that generates novel cross-domain research hypotheses autonomously.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
